entries.completion_basis: Prime Reborn cutover source merged after final whole-program Strikeforce GREEN

RP-C01-RP-C08 are complete; AJ-01-AJ-12 are PROVEN; CAP-027 is RESTORED/ACTIVE; all 28 capability dispositions are reconciled with 0 BLOCKED and 0 STILL_MISSING. Phoenix recovery is accepted. Sunset PR #224 merged at 40e58dcf33bae68f8c819c2f65c6474f52381718. The generated publisher run 29536662886 proved Ubuntu/Windows parity and a truthful zero-delta NOOP. Living Emberline is COMPLETE/CLOSED; Repairing Prime is removed from active continuity; independent Quest states are unchanged.

Mission #276 transferred Investiture Accounting to the bounded Codex / Operation Source Governance Mission family with FS-C01-M01 through M03 proven and M04 unfinished; Glass Codex to Prime Ascendant / Operation Glass Codex; and Seon to Prime Ascendant / Operation Harmony. Apple Reminders authority and the Hermes bridge boundary are unchanged. Historical source, receipts, checkpoints, identity decisions, recovery, and proof remain preserved.
